::: {.section}
::: {.green-background}

::: {.grid unless-meta-empty="acronym"}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Reporting guideline acronym**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta acronym >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Reporting guideline provided for?**
**(i.e. exactly what the authors state in the paper)**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta for >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid unless-meta-empty="relevant-urls"}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Relevant URLs**
**(full-text if available)**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta relevant-urls >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid unless-meta-empty="pubmed-id"}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**PubMed ID**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
[{{< meta pubmed-id >}}](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/{{< meta pubmed-id >}})
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

:::
<!-- background-colour -->
:::
<!-- section -->

::: {.section}

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Full bibliographic reference**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta reference >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Language**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
English
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid unless-meta-empty="other-languages"}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Availability in additional languages**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta other-languages >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid unless-meta-empty='related-rgs'}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Relevant more generic / specialised reporting guidelines**
**(i.e. main generic guideline or extension to a generic guideline)**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate} 
{{< meta related-rgs >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid unless-meta-empty="rg-website"}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Reporting guideline website URL**
:::

::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta rg-website >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid unless-meta-empty='study-design'}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Study design**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}

{{< meta study-design >}}

:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid unless-meta-empty="applies-to-section"}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Applies to the whole report or to individual sections of the report?**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta applies-to-section >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

:::
<!-- section -->
